notes: This inventory describes intentional Android Orca subset stubs.
A surfaced product feature that depends on a blocked subsystem must either link the real Orca implementation or stay documented as blocked/config-only.

files.allowedProductScope: Config/export helpers and non-product debug/image paths.
blockedProductAreas: Voronoi/MedialAxis-dependent geometry behavior if surfaced directly

files.allowedProductScope: Current Android STL and accepted BBS 3MF mesh-extraction/project path plus runtime temporary directory shim.
blockedProductAreas: model backup/save helpers outside the accepted Android project path

files.allowedProductScope: Single/normal-material Android print/export paths where linked real Orca sources own the exercised behavior.
blockedProductAreas: wipe tower and prime tower functional validation
realProductAreas: non-painted fuzzy-skin perimeter generation via Feature/FuzzySkin/FuzzySkin.cpp
